summary.headline: Bunge Global SA announces expiration and final results of exchange offers for its existing Viterra notes.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge completed the exchange offers and consent solicitations for its existing Viterra notes, with 96.63% to 99.93% of the principal amount tendered.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Exchange offers and consent solicitations for up to $1.95 billion aggregate principal amount of new notes.

extraction_notes: Numbers and details from the filing text; cover sheet only had Item references.
